texto: A suicide is always, for those close to the deceased, a tragic and agonising event; but when it is accomplished by means of jam, one cannot be less than terrified.

texto: Is it by chance that the 18th century of France, the century of the "philosophy of enlightenment," did not produce any poets except the Marquis de Sade, who -- despite his participation in the events of this epoch -- expressed the first violent protest against the essential postulates of this period?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Benjamin Péret que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Is it by chance that the 18th century of France, the century of the "philosophy of enlightenment,…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, enlightenment, sade, com foco em sade.
